writings.text: トラの威を借るキツネ

readings.text: とらのいをかるきつね

furigana.writing: トラの威を借るキツネ
furigana.reading: とらのいをかるきつね
とらのいをかるきつね

glossary: a fox that borrows the authority of a tiger
person who borrows the authority of another to browbeat others
small person acting arrogantly on someone else's authority
